title: asplenium daghestanicum subsp. iskardense
intro: Asplenium daghestanicum subsp. iskardense is a subspecies of the fern Asplenium daghestanicum, belonging to the family Aspleniaceae, commonly known as the spleenwort fern. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of A. daghestanicum subsp. iskardense include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of A. daghestanicum subsp. iskardense can be made by drying and grinding the leaves, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea, or using them in tinctures and infusions.
